request_notes.special_instructions: SARs and all data rights requests (access, delete, export, rectify) should be submitted via the Privacy Requests Page portal at https://help.glassdoor.com/s/privacyrequest. Identity verification is required: a verification email with a confirmation link will be sent to the registered email address upon submission. The DPO can be contacted at dpo@glassdoor.com. For GDPR-specific enquiries, gdpr@glassdoor.com was the published contact. EU GDPR representative: Glassdoor Hiring Solutions Ireland Ltd. UK GDPR representative: Glassdoor Global Ltd.
